> all_equal_but_call <- function(target, current, ...) {
+   attr(target, "call") <- NULL
+   attr(current, "call") <- NULL
+   all.equal(target = target, current = current, ...)
+ }
>

> ## ---------------------------------------------------------
> ## by()
> ## ---------------------------------------------------------
> if (require("datasets") && require("stats")) { ## warpbreaks & lm()
+   ## Use a local variable to test that it is properly exported, because
+   ## 'warpbreaks' is available in all R sessions
+   data <- warpbreaks
+   
+   y0 <- by(data[, 1:2], INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = summary)
+   y1 <- by(data[, 1], INDICES = data[, -1], FUN = summary, digits = 2L)
+   y2 <- by(data, INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = function(x, ...) {
+     lm(breaks ~ wool, data = x, ...)
+   }, singular.ok = FALSE)
+   
+   ## now suppose we want to extract the coefficients by group
+   tmp <- with(data, by(data, INDICES = tension, FUN = function(x) {
+     lm(breaks ~ wool, data = x)
+   }))
+   y3 <- sapply(tmp, coef)
+ 
+   ## Source: {r-source}/tests/reg-tests-1d.R
+   by2 <- function(data, INDICES, FUN) {
+     by(data, INDICES = INDICES, FUN = FUN)
+   }
+   future_by2 <- function(data, INDICES, FUN) {
+     future_by(data, INDICES = INDICES, FUN = FUN)
+   }
+   y4 <- by2(data, INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = summary)
+ 
+   for (cores in 1:availCores) {
+     message(sprintf("Testing with %d cores ...", cores))
+     options(mc.cores = cores)
+     strategies <- supportedStrategies(cores)
+   
+     for (strategy in supportedStrategies()) {
+       message(sprintf("- plan('%s') ...", strategy))
+       plan(strategy)
+     
+       y0f <- future_by(data[, 1:2], INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = summary)
+       stopifnot(all_equal_but_call(y0f, y0, check.attributes = FALSE))
+       
+       y1f <- future_by(data[, 1], INDICES = data[, -1], FUN = summary, digits = 2L)
+       stopifnot(all_equal_but_call(y1f, y1))
+       
+       y2f <- future_by(data, INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = function(x, ...) {
+         lm(breaks ~ wool, data = x, ...)
+       }, singular.ok = FALSE)
+       stopifnot(all_equal_but_call(y2f, y2))
+       
+       ## now suppose we want to extract the coefficients by group
+       tmp <- with(data, future_by(data, INDICES = tension, FUN = function(x) {
+         lm(breaks ~ wool, data = x)
+       }))
+       y3f <- sapply(tmp, coef)
+       stopifnot(all_equal_but_call(y3f, y3))
+       
+       y4f <- future_by2(data, INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = summary)
+       stopifnot(all_equal_but_call(y4f, y4))
+ 
+       ## Deprecated /HB 2022-10-24
+       y4f2 <- future_by2(data, INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = "summary")
+       stopifnot(all_equal_but_call(y4f2, y4))
+ 
+       res <- tryCatch({
+         y4f2 <- future_by2(data, INDICES = data[,"tension"], FUN = "summary")
+       }, warning = identity)
+       stopifnot(inherits(res, "warning"))
+       if (getRversion() >= "3.6.0") {
+         stopifnot(inherits(res, "deprecatedWarning"))
+       }
+     } ## for (strategy ...)
+     
+     message(sprintf("Testing with %d cores ... DONE", cores))
+   } ## for (cores ...)
+ } ## if (require("stats"))

[09:35:02.595]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:35:02.595]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:02.595]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:02.595]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:02.595]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:02.595]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:02.595]                   envs[common]]

[09:35:02.595]                   name <- changed[[kk]]

[09:35:02.595]                     next

[09:35:02.595]                 }

[09:35:02.686]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")

[09:35:02.686]                             break

[09:35:03.017]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:03.017]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:03.017]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:03.017]                   envs[common]]
[09:35:03.017]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:35:03.017]                 args <- list()
[09:35:03.017]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:03.017]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:03.017]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:03.017]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:03.017]                     next
[09:35:03.017]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:03.017]                 }
[09:35:03.017]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:35:03.017]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:03.017]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:35:03.017]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:03.017]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:03.017]                     next
[09:35:03.017]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:03.017]                 }
[09:35:03.017]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:03.017]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:03.017]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:03.017]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:03.017]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:03.017]                     next
[09:35:03.017]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:03.017]                 }
[09:35:03.017]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:03.017]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:03.017]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:03.017]             }
[09:35:03.017]             else {
[09:35:03.017]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:35:03.017]             }
[09:35:03.017]             {
[09:35:03.017]                 if (base::length(...future.futureOptionsAdded) > 
[09:35:03.017]                   0L) {

[09:35:03.017]                     NULL

[09:35:03.460]                   {
[09:35:03.460]                     inherits <- base::inherits
[09:35:03.460]                     invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:35:03.460]                     is.null <- base::is.null
[09:35:03.460]                     muffled <- FALSE
[09:35:03.460]                     if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:03.460]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:03.460]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:03.460]                         invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:35:03.460]                     }
[09:35:03.460]                     else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:03.460]                       muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:03.460]                       if (muffled) 
[09:35:03.460]                         invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:35:03.460]                     }
[09:35:03.460]                     else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:35:03.460]                       if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:35:03.460]                         computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:35:03.460]                         grepl <- base::grepl
[09:35:03.460]                         restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:35:03.460]                         for (restart in restarts) {
[09:35:03.460]                           name <- restart$name
[09:35:03.460]                           if (is.null(name)) 
[09:35:03.460]                             next
[09:35:03.460]                           if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:35:03.460]                             next
[09:35:03.460]                           invokeRestart(restart)
[09:35:03.460]                           muffled <- TRUE
[09:35:03.460]                           break
[09:35:03.460]                         }
[09:35:03.460]                       }
[09:35:03.460]                     }
[09:35:03.460]                     invisible(muffled)
[09:35:03.460]                   }
[09:35:03.460]                   muffleCondition(cond)
[09:35:03.460]                 })
[09:35:03.460]             }))

[09:35:03.552]                       inherits <- base::inherits
[09:35:03.552]                       invokeRestart <- base::invokeRestart
[09:35:03.552]                       is.null <- base::is.null
[09:35:03.552]                       muffled <- FALSE
[09:35:03.552]                       if (inherits(cond, "message")) {
[09:35:03.552]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleMessage")
[09:35:03.552]                         if (muffled) 
[09:35:03.552]                           invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
[09:35:03.552]                       }
[09:35:03.552]                       else if (inherits(cond, "warning")) {
[09:35:03.552]                         muffled <- grepl(pattern, "muffleWarning")
[09:35:03.552]                         if (muffled) 
[09:35:03.552]                           invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
[09:35:03.552]                       }
[09:35:03.552]                       else if (inherits(cond, "condition")) {
[09:35:03.552]                         if (!is.null(pattern)) {
[09:35:03.552]                           computeRestarts <- base::computeRestarts
[09:35:03.552]                           grepl <- base::grepl
[09:35:03.552]                           restarts <- computeRestarts(cond)
[09:35:03.552]                           for (restart in restarts) {
[09:35:03.552]                             name <- restart$name
[09:35:03.552]                             if (is.null(name)) 
[09:35:03.552]                               next
[09:35:03.552]                             if (!grepl(pattern, name)) 
[09:35:03.552]                               next
[09:35:03.552]                             invokeRestart(restart)
[09:35:03.552]                             muffled <- TRUE
[09:35:03.552]                             break
[09:35:03.552]                           }
[09:35:03.552]                         }
[09:35:03.552]                       }
[09:35:03.552]                       invisible(muffled)
[09:35:03.552]                     }
[09:35:03.552]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:35:03.552]                   }
[09:35:03.552]                 }
[09:35:03.552]             }
[09:35:03.552]         }))
[09:35:03.552]     }, error = function(ex) {

[09:35:04.016]                   {

[09:35:04.016]                     if (file_test("-f", pathname_tmp)) {

[09:35:04.016]                       stopf("Cannot save RDS file because a temporary save file already exists: %s (%0.f bytes; last modified on %s)",

[09:35:04.016]                     }, error = function(ex) {

[09:35:04.016]                       fi_tmp <- file.info(pathname_tmp)

[09:35:04.016]                       ex$message <- msg
[09:35:04.016]                       stop(ex)
[09:35:04.016]                     })
[09:35:04.016]                     stopifnot(file_test("-f", pathname_tmp))
[09:35:04.016]                     res <- file.rename(from = pathname_tmp, to = pathname)

[09:35:04.054]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:04.054]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:04.054]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:04.054]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:04.054]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:04.054]                   envs[common]]
[09:35:04.054]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)

[09:35:04.054]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:04.054]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:04.054]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:04.054]                     next
[09:35:04.054]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:04.054]                 }
[09:35:04.054]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)

[09:35:04.054]                   name <- added[[kk]]

[09:35:04.054]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:04.054]                     next
[09:35:04.054]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:04.054]                 }
[09:35:04.054]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:04.054]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:04.054]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:04.054]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:04.054]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:04.054]                     next

[09:35:04.054]                 }
[09:35:04.054]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:04.054]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:04.054]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL

[09:35:05.271]                 names <- names(envs)

[09:35:05.271]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:05.271]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:05.271]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:05.271]                   envs[common]]
[09:35:05.271]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)

[09:35:05.271]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:05.271]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:05.271]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:05.271]                     next
[09:35:05.271]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:05.271]                 }
[09:35:05.271]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)

[09:35:05.271]                   name <- added[[kk]]

[09:35:05.271]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:05.271]                     next
[09:35:05.271]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:05.271]                 }

[09:35:05.271]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:05.271]                   name <- removed[[kk]]

[09:35:05.271]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names))

[09:35:05.271]                 }
[09:35:05.271]                 if (length(args) > 0)

[09:35:05.271]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL

[09:35:05.399]             base::options(...future.oldOptions)
[09:35:05.399]             if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
[09:35:05.399]                 old_names <- names(...future.oldEnvVars)
[09:35:05.399]                 envs <- base::Sys.getenv()
[09:35:05.399]                 names <- names(envs)
[09:35:05.399]                 common <- intersect(names, old_names)
[09:35:05.399]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:05.399]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:05.399]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:05.399]                   envs[common]]
[09:35:05.399]                 NAMES <- toupper(changed)
[09:35:05.399]                 args <- list()
[09:35:05.399]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:05.399]                   name <- changed[[kk]]
[09:35:05.399]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:05.399]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:05.399]                     next
[09:35:05.399]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:05.399]                 }
[09:35:05.399]                 NAMES <- toupper(added)
[09:35:05.399]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:05.399]                   name <- added[[kk]]
[09:35:05.399]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:05.399]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:05.399]                     next
[09:35:05.399]                   args[[name]] <- ""
[09:35:05.399]                 }
[09:35:05.399]                 NAMES <- toupper(removed)
[09:35:05.399]                 for (kk in seq_along(NAMES)) {
[09:35:05.399]                   name <- removed[[kk]]
[09:35:05.399]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:05.399]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:05.399]                     next
[09:35:05.399]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:05.399]                 }
[09:35:05.399]                 if (length(args) > 0) 
[09:35:05.399]                   base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = args)
[09:35:05.399]                 args <- names <- old_names <- NAMES <- envs <- common <- added <- removed <- NULL
[09:35:05.399]             }
[09:35:05.399]             else {
[09:35:05.399]                 base::do.call(base::Sys.setenv, args = base::as.list(...future.oldEnvVars))
[09:35:05.399]             }
[09:35:05.399]             {
[09:35:05.399]                 if (base::length(...future.futureOptionsAdded) > 
[09:35:05.399]                   0L) {

[09:35:05.487]                 added <- setdiff(names, old_names)
[09:35:05.487]                 removed <- setdiff(old_names, names)
[09:35:05.487]                 changed <- common[...future.oldEnvVars[common] != 
[09:35:05.487]                   envs[common]]

[09:35:05.487]                   NAME <- NAMES[[kk]]
[09:35:05.487]                   if (name != NAME && is.element(NAME, old_names)) 
[09:35:05.487]                     next
[09:35:05.487]                   args[[name]] <- ...future.oldEnvVars[[name]]
[09:35:05.487]                 }

[09:35:05.487]                     next

[09:35:05.487]                 }

[09:35:05.487]                 }

[09:35:05.487]             }

[09:35:05.526]                               next
[09:35:05.526]                             invokeRestart(restart)

[09:35:05.526]                             break
[09:35:05.526]                           }
[09:35:05.526]                         }
[09:35:05.526]                       }

[09:35:05.526]                     }
[09:35:05.526]                     muffleCondition(cond, pattern = "^muffle")
[09:35:05.526]                   }

[09:35:05.526]                         if (muffled)

[09:35:05.526]                               next

[09:35:05.526]                             break
